title: Smeltable Horse Armor
description: This mod lets you melt horse armor
body:
This mod lets you melt horse armor

Iron horse armor to Iron Ingot

![Smelting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0580a47a341d50ffaee46f245e16f82dc36571b_0.webp)

Gold horse armor to Gold Ingot

![Smelting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/061a083104c61925415abd4fae15422c4f8cc090.png)
